name: @platform/infra-aws
description: AWS infrastructure definitions: ECS/EKS workloads, RDS, ElastiCache, S3, IAM, and network topology.

readme.summary: AWS infrastructure definitions: ECS/EKS workloads, RDS, ElastiCache, S3, IAM, and network topology.
responsibilities: Define Terraform configurations for all AWS resources used by the platform
Manage network topology (VPC, subnets, security groups) per environment
Provision compute workloads (ECS tasks or EKS deployments) for application services
Define IAM roles, policies, and instance profiles following least-privilege principle
nonResponsibilities: Does not own Terraform workflow tooling or module patterns (tooling-terraform)
Does not define application container images (tooling-docker)
Does not manage DNS or CDN configuration
usage: Applied via tooling-terraform scripts as part of the infrastructure pipeline in tooling-ci
Per-environment workspaces isolate state between development, staging, and production
operationalNotes: All resources must be tagged with environment, service, and owner for cost allocation
Production applies require manual approval step in the CI pipeline
